de-h-id-297.notes: Pilot: corps assignment held constant over the pilot window; positions derived from the corps sector (approximate).

positions.label: Uranus: southern pincer through the lakes

sources.citation: Glantz, D. & House, J. — Stalingrad trilogy (To the Gates of Stalingrad; Armageddon in Stalingrad; Endgame at Stalingrad), 2009–2014

su-army-51.notes: Pilot coverage: Operation Uranus and the Kotelnikovo defense only.

positions.label: First clashes in the Don bend
Backs to the Volga; Chuikov takes command
Holding the river strip inside the ring

sources.citation: Glantz, D. & House, J. — Stalingrad trilogy (To the Gates of Stalingrad; Armageddon in Stalingrad; Endgame at Stalingrad), 2009–2014

su-army-62.notes: Pilot coverage: Don bend to the city victory. Held the west-bank strip through the siege.
